subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up after the conference! I'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore how we might work together.

Here are some available slots for a 30-minute call:

- Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let me know which time suits you best and I'll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share internal contact information. For reaching the right people at our company, please refer to our public website which has the appropriate contact channels.

Looking forward to speaking soon!

Best regards
